## Summary

## Type of Change

- documentation
- exercise update
- dataset update
- code change
- test improvement
- project enhancement

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped and clear
- [ ] The content still fits the course learning path
- [ ] Links and file paths were checked
- [ ] Code examples are syntactically valid
- [ ] Tests were added or updated if needed
- [ ] Beginner clarity was preserved

Add any reviewer context, assumptions, or tradeoffs here.
